heading: Virgin Islands; extension of National Bank Act
label: 40 Virgin Islands; extension of National Bank Act
text: The National Bank Act, as amended [ et seq.], and all other Acts of Congress relating to national banks, shall, insofar as not locally inapplicable after , apply to the Virgin Islands of the United States.12 U.S.C. 21July 19, 1932
notes: References in TextThe National Bank Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to chapter 2 (§ 21 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see References in Text note set out under .act June 3, 1864, ch. 10613 Stat. 99section 38 of this title
